overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character exploring the Gryffindor common room. The character walks past NPCs seated by fireplaces and bookshelves, examining medieval stone architecture, magical portraits, and a ghostly figure near a spiral staircase. The environment features warm firelight, ornate wooden furniture, and Gothic arched ceilings.

events.description: character begins walking from fireplace toward the right side of the room

agents.ego_description: walking away from the large fireplace and moving toward the seating area with bookshelves

notable_agents.action: two students sitting on a striped sofa, one reading a book
student sitting in orange armchair near bookshelf

entered.detail: ornate stone fireplace with burning fire and portrait above mantel
thick wooden support beams with intricate Celtic knot carvings flanking the fireplace
tall wooden bookshelf set into arched stone wall
large circular patterned rug on stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character stands before a large stone fireplace with a burning fire, then begins walking toward the right side of the common room. The space features ornate wooden pillars with Celtic carvings, bookshelves set into arched walls, and students sitting on sofas and armchairs. The warm firelight illuminates the Gothic stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room corner with grandfather clock and bulletin board

events.description: moves from open seating area to corner with grandfather clock and bulletin board
character stops walking to examine the bulletin board and look up at the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: standing still near the grandfather clock, looking at posted notices on the bulletin board

notable_agents.action: student sitting in chair near the wall reading a book
student standing near bookshelf in the background

entered.detail: tall ornate wooden grandfather clock with gold face and pendulum
wooden notice board with several papers and a crest pinned to it
wooden spiral staircase with carved banister leading upward
large green cactus in terracotta pot

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a corner of the common room featuring a tall grandfather clock and wooden bulletin board covered in notices. A spiral staircase rises to the right. The character stops to examine the board while other students sit reading nearby. The fireplace is now behind and to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: central common room seating area with multiple sofas

events.description: character turns and begins walking back toward the center of the room
moves from bulletin board area back to main seating area with large sofas

agents.ego_description: walking through the center of the common room, passing groups of students seated on sofas and armchairs

notable_agents.action: group of three students sitting on cream-colored sofa, conversing
student in red armchair reading near small table with flowers

entered.detail: long upholstered sofa with striped pattern where students are gathered
plush red velvet armchair with high back
small wooden side table with pink flowers in glass vase
potted plants hanging from ceiling beams
several framed portraits on stone wall including oval and rectangular frames

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the central seating area of the common room, passing students conversing on a cream-colored sofa and reading in red armchairs. The space opens up to show hanging plants from the ceiling beams and magical portraits on the far wall. The spiral staircase recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: back wall with magical paintings, antique globe, and spiral staircase

events.description: moves from center seating to back wall with framed paintings and antique globe
ghostly figure of Nearly Headless Nick becomes visible floating near the spiral staircase
character turns away from back wall and walks toward the spiral staircase area

agents.ego_description: examining the magical portraits on the back wall, then walking toward the ghost near the staircase

notable_agents.action: elderly student sitting in orange armchair against back wall
translucent ghost floating near the spiral staircase

entered.detail: large brass terrestrial globe on ornate wooden stand
wooden writing desk with green glass lamp and books

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the back wall featuring magical portraits and an antique globe on a wooden stand. A translucent ghost floats near the spiral staircase, which now appears on the left side of the frame. The character examines the paintings before turning toward the stairs, passing a wooden desk with a green lamp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy, firelit common room that transitions from a hearth-side gathering space to a quiet corner of magical study. It begins before a large stone fireplace, moving past ornate wooden pillars and students lounging in armchairs under the glow of Gothic stone architecture. As the camera shifts toward a corner, the scene opens up to reveal a tall grandfather clock and a notice-covered bulletin board beside a rising spiral staircase. The movement then flows back through the central seating area, passing cream-colored sofas and hanging plants before the space expands toward the far wall. Finally, the camera approaches a collection of magical portraits and an antique globe, passing a translucent ghost and a green desk lamp before turning back toward the staircase.
